title: narcissus radiiflorus var. stellaris
intro: Narcissus radiiflorus var. stellaris, also known as the stellar narcissus or vernal narcissus, is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. It is a bulbous perennial that has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant contains compounds with potential health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The flowers and bulbs of the stellar narcissus can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
